rationale: Live-action UGC of a guy on a bed showcasing a level-progression food game collides with aquapark.io's DNA on every axis: muted bedroom palette vs. bright blue/orange waterpark, no gameplay footage to convey the slide/bump/overtake loop, and a "reached level 55" satisfaction beat that doesn't map to a hypercasual race-to-finish. Audience skews adult-casual mobile gamer rather than the younger competitive crowd aquapark.io targets. Only run as a test if you rewrite the script around competitive bragging ("I just knocked 7 people off the slide") and cut hard to vibrant gameplay by second 2 — otherwise skip.
